vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp đến ngạt thở
vocab.example: I am an avid photographer who loves capturing breathtaking landscapes whenever I travel to the countryside.

vocab.meaning: những sắc thái màu sắc rực rỡ
vocab.example: The golden hour is my favorite time to take photos because it brings out the vibrant hues of the sunset.

vocab.meaning: thiên nhiên nguyên sơ, chưa bị tác động
vocab.example: I prefer trekking into the deep woods to photograph unspoiled nature away from human interference.
For me, taking scenery pictures is a form of visual storytelling that preserves the essence of a moment.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ, sức hút về mặt nhìn
vocab.example: I often look for symmetrical patterns in nature to enhance the aesthetic appeal of my photographs.
When I reach the summit of a mountain, I always take a panoramic shot to capture the vastness of the horizon.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí tĩnh lặng, thanh bình
vocab.example: Scenery photography allows me to encapsulate the serene atmosphere of a misty morning by the lake.

vocab.meaning: sự giao thoa/đùa nghịch giữa ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: What fascinates me most about landscape photography is the dramatic play of light and shadow on the cliffs.
Even though I’m just an amateur enthusiast, I’ve invested in a high-quality lens to take better nature photos.

vocab.meaning: lưu giữ khoảnh khắc vĩnh cửu
vocab.example: Taking pictures of the sea is my way of trying to immortalize a moment of pure tranquility.
